headline: Lindsey Graham 🧓🏼🔄 Trump Ally Flip-Flop 💥🏛️
text: Lindsey Graham 🧓🏼🇺🇸 was a political SURVIVOR 🛡️ who DANCED 💃 with the MAGA 🔥🌪️ winds. From John McCain 🦸🏼‍♂️ BFF to calling Trump 🍊 a 'JACKASS' 🐴💥, this SC 🐔 senator played the game like a pro 🎮. He once joked 🃏 about opening a BAR 🍺 in the White House 🏠 to get 'LIQUORED UP' 🍾 and SOLVE PROBLEMS 🧩. But when Trump 💥 took over the GOP 🐘, Graham 🐐 flipped faster than a BURGER 🍔 on the GRILL 🔥. He went from 'RACE-BAITING BIGOT' 😡 tweets to GOLFING 🏌️‍♂️🍆 with the DONALD and defending Brett Kavanaugh's 🍺🤢 SCOTUS seat like it was his own BACON 🥓. After J6 🏛️💥 chaos, he said 'COUNT ME OUT' ✋ but then VOTED TO ACQUIT 🗳️ like nothing happened. Ukraine 🇺🇦 help? He wanted MORE but kept quiet 🤫 when Trump 🤝 Putin 🐻 chatted. Even Dems 😢 like Schiff 🧔 and Warren 👩‍🦰 sent LOVE ❤️ after his sudden ILLNESS 😷 took him at 71. Trump 🍊 himself admitted Graham could 'WORK IT OUT' 🤝 with rivals. Now SC 🐔 GOP is SCRAMBLING 🏃‍♂️ for a new candidate while McMaster 👴 picks a temp fill-in. Graham 🧓 built POWER 🏰 through EVERY STORM ⛈️ of the Trump ERA – a FLEX 💪 that leaves BIG SHOES 👟 to fill for whoever takes his SEAT 🪑!
